validate_2026_04_25_opus.notes: Could not run validation: the Bash tool is broken in this session because it requires writing to /home/worker/.claude/session-env, which is treated as a sensitive path and permission cannot be granted. Every Bash invocation returns 'EACCES: permission denied, mkdir /home/worker/.claude/session-env'. Without Bash, Docker, pytest, git, and patch cannot be invoked, so the four validation checks cannot be performed. Identified static issues that the next agent should fix: (1) environment/Dockerfile pins BASE_COMMIT=a14a89ca953910e89697895dfdfb4cdf4c90a151 but eval_manifest.yaml says base_commit is d27d84f45ddb3f2bca3fdb3112e08729a8d2533b — these must match; (2) solution/solve.sh applies CMake patches (SetupWebKit.cmake, BuildBun.cmake, CONTRIBUTING.md, contributing.mdx) which do NOT correspond to the task described in instruction.md or the assertions in tests/test_outputs.py — the tests check for deletion of scripts/build-jsc.ts, package.json updates, scripts/build/clean.ts changes, scripts/build/deps/webkit.ts BUN_WEBKIT_PATH support, scripts/build/source.ts path/hint additions, and CLAUDE.md table reformatting. solve.sh must be replaced with a script that performs the actual TypeScript-side changes described in PR oven-sh/bun#28863.
